name: openloomi
description: Use local OpenLoomi from Codex as a personal assistant and memory layer.

interface.shortDescription: Use your local OpenLoomi assistant from Codex
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to a local OpenLoomi runtime for setup readiness, personal memory workflows, and future one-shot task execution.
